'''Chesea''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]], and wife of [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar]], with whom she mothered three woklings. She and presumably all three of her children were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in an [[Fire/Legends|fire]] in [[Red Bush Grove]], their home village.
